informed_accuracy_caveat: consultant = grader; pinned at 1.0 by construction — a journaled static fact always matches its own answer key
objective: each agent's long-lived goal: raise GroundTruthAccuracy + grow stake (budget)
note: Bootcamp LEARNING loop, HONEST-NULLS (2026-07-09): the coin-flip guess for unknown facts is DELETED — unknown = ABSENCE (not graded) + the agent JOURNALS the revealed truth, so it answers from knowledge next round. Accuracy denominator = journal-informed answers only. Reality-gated: every answer key is a signed fact. Recompute from the internal accuracy + journal ledgers.
